'''âz-r-v-zh''' ('''kazarvezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lobectomize|lobectomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-r-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lobectomize|lobectomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-r-v-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kazarvezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizarvezhoko|thizarvezhoko]] || [[word:jizarvezhoko|jizarvezhoko]] || [[word:shizarvezhoko|shizarvezhoko]] || [[word:kizarvezhoko|kizarvezhoko]]
|-

|-
